phase_name: post-launch hotfix sweep — admin colour autofill + admin autosave

completed_tasks.name: Admin cross-axis autofill on stocked + configurable family (variant-editor + configurator-builder)
Refresh colour-field state after save (stale closure + revalidatePath /edit)
Allow empty colour-field palette on save (removed .min(1))
Use fresh state in cross-axis prompt + auto-prefill new colour fields
Generalise useProductDraft hook (scope, beforeunload flush, callbacks)
Tier prices + variant-row inline edits in autosave
CHOOSE prefix on variant axis labels

remaining_tasks.name: Diagnose variant data loss on /admin/products/5f52e087.../variants
remaining_tasks.blocked_on: ssh access for direct DB query

remaining_tasks.name: Apply description CSS word-break fix (3-line edit ready)
Re-add Zod .min(1) on allowedColorIds at publish-time guard

blockers.description: Cannot SSH to 152.53.86.223 from current Claude environment (key auth denied). Required to verify whether DB rows for product 5f52e087-6aa6-43a0-a4c8-56a98cdccb68 still exist or were deleted.
blockers.workaround: User said they will arrange SSH access for next session. Alternative: cPanel phpMyAdmin or `mysql` invoked from a server-side shell.

human_actions_pending.action: Arrange SSH access to 152.53.86.223 (or grant phpMyAdmin / cPanel UAPI credentials).
human_actions_pending.context: Needed to run: SELECT id, optionValueIds, price, inStock FROM productVariants WHERE productId = '5f52e087-6aa6-43a0-a4c8-56a98cdccb68'

human_actions_pending.action: Confirm or reject the description-display.tsx CSS fix (delete line 48 overflowWrap:anywhere, optionally drop prose-sm from line 43).
human_actions_pending.context: Customer PDP description breaks mid-word. Diagnosis complete; fix is 3 lines.

human_actions_pending.action: Commit the 10 pre-existing brand palette WIP files (brand.ts + 9 dependents).
human_actions_pending.context: Sitting in working tree all session. Brand colour rotation #0080ff/#03C03C/#8A00C2 → #1E8BFF/#39E600/#A855F7. Caveman commit message drafted in session log.

decisions.decision: Customer-side autofill = wrong target. Customer PDP picks pre-curated swatches; cross-axis sync is admin-only.
decisions.rationale: User explicit feedback after attempting customer wiring.

decisions.decision: No customer-side draft autosave. Cart persistence is enough; in-progress configurator state is throwaway.
decisions.rationale: User explicit: 'client only shop dont do anything else as long as what they add stays in the bag'.

decisions.decision: Admin autosave covers ALL product surfaces (form / configurator / variants / tiers / variant-rows) × all product types × /new + /edit.
decisions.rationale: User explicit: 'product type wise store wise and when a new product type or product added auto save should work'.
Prevented the disappearing-field bug class. Mandatory for every new autosave wiring.

decisions.decision: Removed .min(1) on allowedColorIds at save-time; deferred to publish-time guard via TODO.
decisions.rationale: Admin needs to save in-progress products with empty colour fields. Customer-facing safety belongs on publish gate, not save gate.

next_action: 1) Verify SSH access. 2) Run variant DB query for product 5f52e087-6aa6-43a0-a4c8-56a98cdccb68. 3) Branch on result per decision tree in .continue-here.md. 4) After variant bug resolved, apply description CSS fix.
context_notes: Today was a multi-cycle admin-side feature day. Multiple in-flight bugs from rapid iteration. User got burned by piecemeal scope creep — see memory rule feedback_simple_solutions_first.md. Variant data loss is the urgent open item; description word-break is the easy follow-up.
